name: Orange-Beef Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
------------
Orange Sauce: Combine all of the sauce ingredients in a bowl and set aside.
Beef:
- 12 oz Beef top round steak (partially freeze; slice thinly across the grain)
- Nonstick spray coating
- 1 clove Garlic, minced
- 4 Green onions, cut into 1-inch lengths
- 1 tbsp Cooking oil
- 8 oz Fresh spinach, torn into bite-size pieces
- 4 oz Sliced water chestnuts (drained)
Cook:
1. Stir-fry garlic and green onions in a wok or large skillet for 1 minute.
2. Add oil to the wok if needed.
3. Stir-fry half of the beef for 2 to 3 minutes, then remove from the wok.
4. Stir-fry the remaining beef until cooked through.
5. Return all of the beef to the wok.
6. Pour in the Orange Sauce and stir until bubbly.
7. Stir in spinach, water chestnuts, and onion mixture.
8. Cover the wok and cook for 1 minute.
9. Serve hot over rice.
Low Calorie Recipes; Summer 1988
Posted by Fred Peters.
